name: FIRST COMMONWEALTH FINANCIAL CORP /PA/
summary: PART I Overview First Commonwealth Financial Corporation (First Commonwealth, the Company or we) is a financial holding company headquartered in Indiana, Pennsylvania. First Commonwealth's operating subsidiaries include First Commonwealth Bank ("FCB" or the "Bank"), First Commonwealth Insurance Agency, Inc. ("FCIA") and FRAMAL. We provide a diversified array of consumer and commercial banking services through our bank subsidiary, FCB. We also provide trust and wealth management services through ...
